<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by vue-docgen-cli — do not edit. Source: src/components/CnColorPicker/CnColorPicker.vue -->

### Props

| Name       | Type      | Required | Default | Description                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| ---------- | --------- | -------- | ------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `value`    | `string   | object`  |         | `null`                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           | Current color. Accepts any of vue-color's input formats: CSS color string or color object. `null`/empty renders a transparent swatch. |
| `disabled` | `boolean` |          | `false` | Disables the swatch trigger and prevents the popover from opening.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| `mode`     | `string`  |          | `null`  | Lock the picker's numeric input fields to a single mode and hide the mode-toggle button. One of `'hex'`, `'rgb'`, `'hsl'`. When `null` (default) the user can switch modes themselves. The actual fields shown for `'rgb'`/`'hsl'` include alpha when `disable-alpha` is `false` (i.e. they become RGBA / HSLA). |
